attacking_style: High-volume, persistent attacking from early race through multiple breakaway attempts. Demonstrates willingness to reattack even after being caught or dropped, forcing continuous peloton expenditure.
team_tactics: Sport Vlaanderen employs aggressive fatigue tactics, using Reynders as an engine to force peloton work through repeated breakaway insertions regardless of success likelihood.
terrain_preference: Suited to attritional one-day races with multiple laps or circuits where repeated efforts can wear down opposition. Thrives in scenarios requiring resilience over explosive power.
vulnerability: Ultimate success limited by lack of finishing power after multiple hard efforts. Gets dropped on key climbs but strategy appears to prioritize team disruption over personal result.
key_patterns: Enters multiple breakaways in single race, showing exceptional recovery and commitment.
Rechases after being dropped from breakaways rather than abandoning effort.
Continues attacking deep into race despite previous failed attempts.
form_trajectory: neutral: Single race shows strong endurance and tactical discipline but insufficient data for trajectory assessment
